message:
fix: deduplicate worktree redirect logic from PR #1995 followup

Extract worktreeRedirectTarget() helper to centralize the per-worktree
.beads/redirect override logic that was copy-pasted across three
functions (findLocalBeadsDir, FindBeadsDir, findDatabaseInTree).

findLocalBeadsDir keeps an inline check since its contract differs: it
returns the raw .beads dir containing the redirect, not the resolved
target.

Also adds TestFindDatabasePath_WorktreeRedirectOverride to cover the
database discovery path, which was untested by the original PR.

Co-Authored-By: Tim Visher <194828183+timvisher-dd@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
